## admin-toolkit package

Versioned neutral server-rendered admin patterns and lifecycle helpers.

## Classes

<table><thead><tr><th>

Class


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[DuplicateToastIdError](./admin-toolkit.duplicatetoastiderror.md)


</td><td>

Error thrown when a toast stack would contain duplicate DOM identifiers.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[UnknownAdminPatternError](./admin-toolkit.unknownadminpatternerror.md)


</td><td>

Error thrown when a runtime pattern identifier is unknown.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createAdminHydrator(alpine)](./admin-toolkit.createadminhydrator.md)


</td><td>

Create repeat-safe hydration state scoped to one Alpine instance.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createDialogController(dialog, options)](./admin-toolkit.createdialogcontroller.md)


</td><td>

Install focus entry, trapping, Escape closing, and focus restoration. Lifecycle-hook errors propagate only after the controller reconciles its DOM and listener state. A destroyed controller cannot be reopened.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createDisclosure({ initiallyOpen, }, input)](./admin-toolkit.createdisclosure.md)


</td><td>

Create isolated disclosure state.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createDismissible({ initiallyVisible, }, input)](./admin-toolkit.createdismissible.md)


</td><td>

Create isolated dismissible state.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createTabs(input, initiallyActive, initiallyDisabled)](./admin-toolkit.createtabs.md)


</td><td>

Create deterministic roving-selection state for a tab list.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createToastStack(initialToasts)](./admin-toolkit.createtoaststack.md)


</td><td>

Create a stack that preserves unique, stable toast identifiers.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[findAdminHtmlPattern(id)](./admin-toolkit.findadminhtmlpattern.md)


</td><td>

Find a pattern by untrusted string identifier.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getAdminHtmlPattern(id)](./admin-toolkit.getadminhtmlpattern.md)


</td><td>

Return a pattern or throw for any invalid runtime input.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[installHtmxHydration(htmx, alpine, { force }, input)](./admin-toolkit.installhtmxhydration.md)


</td><td>

Install htmx fragment hydration and return an idempotent unsubscribe hook. The listener supplied by htmx `onLoad()` is removed through `off()`<!-- -->. Duplicate installations for the same htmx/Alpine pair share one listener and release it after the final subscriber unsubscribes.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[registerAdminAlpine(alpine, { prefix }, input)](./admin-toolkit.registeradminalpine.md)


</td><td>

Register providers exactly once for each Alpine instance and prefix.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
